name: runtime-config-monorepo
description: Framework-agnostic runtime config — inspired by Nuxt 3/4 useRuntimeConfig

scripts.pub: bun run build && (cd packages/core && npm publish) && (cd packages/vite && npm publish) && (cd packages/react && npm publish)
scripts.pub:dry: bun run build && (cd packages/core && npm publish --dry-run) && (cd packages/vite && npm publish --dry-run) && (cd packages/react && npm publish --dry-run)
